content.en:
After a period of time, Ye Tian's body has completed its transformation.

"My Yuanxing Ultimate Body has reached the Great Achievement Realm, it is too powerful, far beyond the Great Completion Ultimate Body of the Transcendent Dimensional Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the Abyssal Star's ultimate body is only physically powerful, and other aspects are very ordinary.

But Ye Tian cultivated both the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System and the Yuanxing Ultimate System, and when the two Ultimate Systems were combined, his strength was extremely terrifying.

The weakness of the Abyssal Star Ultimate System can be made up for by the Extra-Dimensional Realm Ultimate System, and the weakness of the Extra-Dimensional Realm Ultimate System can be made up by the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, and the two can almost complement each other.

"I should be able to easily kill the Nine Realms peak existence like the True Wu Realm Lord and the Ancient Ape True Monarch in seconds now. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Afterwards.

He replaced all the other copied bodies, and all the copied bodies completed the breakthrough in an instant.

After the breakthrough, he could only accelerate his comprehension of the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rules when he observed the main body of the Abyssal Star, and if he wanted to continue to improve the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, it was estimated that he would not be able to do it.

Because his Abyssal Star System is already extremely perfect, it is enough for him to impact the Ultimate Realm of the Abyss Star System in the future.

Thereupon. 310 Ye Tian's replica body is here to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Yuan Star, and he will not do anything else.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian's other replica body is still here to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Monument to improve the ultimate rules of the Dimensional Sea.

At present, his Dimension Sea Ultimate Rule and Abyss Star Ultimate Rule are both in the same Ultimate Rule realm, and it is really very difficult for the Ultimate Rule to improve.

It may be easier to move up to the Double Ultimate Rule, but if you continue to improve, the difficulty will skyrocket.

Another period of time has passed.

With the help of the Ultimate Ancient Monument, Ye Tian finally broke through to the realm of the Ultimate Rules of the Sea of Dimensions.

But at this time, he continued to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Monument, and his efficiency decreased at a speed visible to the naked eye, and if he wanted to rely on the Ultimate Ancient Monument to raise the Ultimate Rule to the Triple Realm, he didn't know how many long years it would take.

This is still a bunch of ultimate talents, his comprehension is far beyond that of others, and he can also sacrifice other replica bodies to use some special multi-dimensional star weapons to deduce and analyze, so the efficiency of comprehension far exceeds that of other Nine Realms Peaks I don't know how many times.

In other ways to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Nine Realms to comprehend, it took me many times as many years as him.

In other words, a powerhouse in his realm is actually no longer able to look down on the ultimate ancient monument.

The Ultimate Ancient Monument was of great help to those Nine Realms Peak who had not comprehended the Ultimate Rules, and it was of very little help to his level.

In fact, at his current level, if he didn't break into the Dimensional Sea, it would be too difficult to progress.

Every existence that can break through to the Ultimate Realm Lord has been wandering in the Sea of Dimensions for countless years, and finally succeeded in breaking through, and directly closed into the Ultimate Realm Lord without retreat.

"The Sea of Dimensions is infinitely vast, even if you are the Ultimate Realm Master, you may not fully understand the Sea of Dimensions, you still have to explore the Sea of Dimensions to find other opportunities!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He came to Lady Domi.

"Lady Domi. "

Ye Tian said respectfully.

In the past, when he saw Lord Duomi, he only felt that Lord Duomi was extremely powerful, and he had a feeling in his heart that he could not compete, which was the reason why the gap between their strengths was too great.

But now, although he still thinks that Lord Duomi is very strong and that he is not an opponent, he does not have the feeling that he is like an ant.

Although he is still far from Lord Duomi, this gap is not a world of difference.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you are very good, you have cultivated the Yuanxing System to such a point!" Lord Duomi said in surprise.

"Lord Duomi, I want to buy some specific information about the Dimensional Sea, such as information on various treasures and special places, which should be more comprehensive (aicj) kind. Ye Tian said.

"Yes. Lord Duomi guessed that Ye Tian wanted to go to the Sea of Dimensions, so he compiled a large amount of information and gathered it together, "This information is worth 100,000 contribution points. "

The contribution value required is not much, Ye Tian asked Lord Duomi to deduct it directly, and he also directly obtained this information.

......

Ye Tian obtained these materials from the Sea of Dimensions, and continued to browse and analyze them, so as to decide where to go in the future.

There is no need to go to ordinary places, there is no danger, which means that there is no crisis.

Choosing and choosing, he finally decided to go here.

The Tianqu Forbidden Zone is a place where the Ultimate Realm Lord will not go, and the Tianqu Forbidden Area is unwilling to enter, not because their strength is not good, but because the Ultimate Realm Lord cannot enter the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, if they force it in, it will pay a great price, and it will cause too much terror.

There was once an Ultimate Realm Lord who tried to explore the secrets of the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, and used a secret technique to forcibly force the forbidden area in disregard of the rules there, but it completely fell, and the incarnation of the outside world instantly shattered and dissipated.

Since then, the Ultimate Realm Masters have not dared to enter the Heavenly Qu Forbidden Zone.

However, when the existence of the peak of the Nine Realms entered the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, there was still hope of coming out alive.

According to the data, the Tianqu Forbidden Zone has a lot of opportunities, some of the Nine Realms Peak who have comprehended the ultimate rules have entered the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, some have fallen, but some have gained great opportunities, thus breaking through to the main realm of the Ultimate Realm.

"It is very difficult to comprehend the ultimate rules, and there are some ultimate things in the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, which can assist in comprehending the ultimate rules. "

Based on this information, Ye Tian chose to enter the Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

......

Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

Ye Tian kept hurrying and finally arrived here.

At this moment, in Ye Tian's perception, there was a void in front of him, and after getting closer, he seemed to see the continuous majestic mountains, but the dimensional void seemed to be constantly superimposed.

In fact, the inside of the Tianqu forbidden area is constantly changing, divided into many heavy dimensional voids, and the position is constantly transformed, so it is easier to get in, but if you want to get out, you must master the rules before you can rush out of it.

Swish!

Ye Tian directly escaped into the Tianqu Forbidden Zone.

In an instant, he arrived in an unknown place.

This is a black sea full of despair, and as far as the eye can see, the place covered by perception is an endless dark atmosphere.

He stood on the black sea, touched the black water, and a strange force surged, but it could not pose a threat to his ultimate body.

"The corrosive power of the black sea water is still terrifying, and the average Nine Realms peak powerhouse should not be able to resist it, and it will turn into a corpse in an instant!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
